message:
test(cli): coverage boost — resolveAgentName, looksLikeAgentName, parseMessageIDs, renderTempBar, renderTags, valueOrDefault, formatHandoffMarkdown

28 new tests for pure functions across mail.go, personas.go, handoff.go:
resolveAgentName all branches (agent title, claude/codex/gemini fallback,
unknown type, non-agent title), looksLikeAgentName valid/invalid cases,
parseMessageIDs empty/valid/invalid, renderTempBar 4 temperature ranges
+ boundary values, renderTags empty/single/multiple, valueOrDefault,
formatHandoffMarkdown minimal/full/no-optional-sections.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
